title: Moderation Update: Abuse Queue Cleared
body:
The moderation team has reviewed and resolved 6 pending reports:

🚫 Banned Users (2):
• spam_wave_42 — Phishing links across multiple channels (zero tolerance violation)
• toxic_runner — Repeated targeted harassment against newcomers

⚠️ Warned Users (1):
• bot_like_user_77 — Suspicious automated/repetitive replies in help channels

✅ No Action / Closed (3):
• new_member_17 — Minor formatting issue (off-topic post)
• trusted_helper — Dispute resolved, trusted member cleared
• core_maintainer — False positive from brigading attack, trusted member cleared

Two protected community roles (trusted_helper, core_maintainer) were correctly flagged as exempt from sanctions during this review.

Report spam and harassment via the usual channels. Stay safe. 🔒
